archetypes.name: The Steady Hand
archetypes.tagline: Calm finds him before the storm does.
archetypes.flavor: Breathe. We've been worse off than this. I'll show you how.
archetypes.mechanicalHook: Friendly cards in his zone are immune to opponent's tax_attention and arrange ops while he's there. Absorbed v1's Quiet Type.

archetypes.name: The Listener
archetypes.tagline: Doesn't fix what doesn't need fixing.
archetypes.flavor: I'm not going to tell you what I'd do. Tell me again what happened.
archetypes.mechanicalHook: Activated: tap, pay 1 Attention to look at top of opponent's deck and replace it. Information without disturbance.

archetypes.name: The Cook
archetypes.flavor: The secret is butter. The other secret is more butter.
archetypes.mechanicalHook: onEnter: restore 1 Attention to next turn. Moment SUNDAY DINNER fires when Cook + Kin share zone for two consecutive turns.

archetypes.name: The Storyteller
archetypes.tagline: Memory is a kind of time travel.
archetypes.flavor: Did I ever tell you about your grandfather? Sit down. This one matters.
archetypes.mechanicalHook: Activated: tap, pay 1 Attention to name a virtue you've Practiced; capture a Moment named after it.

archetypes.name: The Long-Distance Dad
archetypes.tagline: Voice on the phone. Letter in the mail.
archetypes.flavor: I miss the breakfast. The breakfast knows.
archetypes.mechanicalHook: onEnter: even with no zone slots, places into 'the road' for one turn (peeking opponent deck), then enters chosen zone.

archetypes.name: The Big Brother Dad
archetypes.tagline: Older sibling who stepped up before he was ready.
archetypes.flavor: I figured it out as I went. You'll do better, because I went first.
archetypes.mechanicalHook: onEnter: target friendly Kin gains +1 Maturity AND a virtue tag of your choice that you've already Practiced.

archetypes.name: The Player
archetypes.flavor: Hot lava! HOT LAVA. The couch is the only safe place. Has been since you were four.
archetypes.mechanicalHook: onEnter: look at top 3 of deck; play one at -1 Attention. Moment HOT LAVA fires if 3+ Play-tagged cards share his zone.

archetypes.name: The Granddad
archetypes.tagline: Has seen this all before. Still gentle about it.
archetypes.flavor: Your dad did this same thing. Don't tell him I told you.
archetypes.mechanicalHook: Passive: Persisting effects cost -1. onEnter: capture SUNDAY COMICS Moment if Kin in any zone. Bidirectional teaching candidate.

archetypes.name: The In-Progress Dad
archetypes.tagline: Still figuring it out. Out loud.
archetypes.flavor: I'm learning to be a better person every day. I cannot change the past. I can only course correct.
archetypes.mechanicalHook: Passive: gains a Growth counter each turn you Practice a new virtue. With 3+ counters, your Trying-tagged cards cost -1.

archetypes.name: The Coach
archetypes.tagline: Believes in you before you do.
archetypes.flavor: You miss 100% of the shots. So take it. I've got the rebound.
archetypes.mechanicalHook: Passive: when you play another card in his zone, that card's onEnter runs at +1 strength. Moment PEP TALK with Kin in zone.

archetypes.name: The Adventurer
archetypes.tagline: Get in the car. We're going.
archetypes.flavor: I don't know where the road goes. That's the best part of any road.
archetypes.mechanicalHook: onEnter: move one of your other cards from any zone to a different zone, free. Moment SURPRISE TRIP if all cards moved this turn.

archetypes.name: The Advocate
archetypes.tagline: Stands between, speaks up, calls the coach.
archetypes.flavor: I see you. I see what you're doing. I'm asking nicely once.
archetypes.mechanicalHook: onEnter: protect a friendly card from disruption all match. Activated once per match: name a virtue you've Practiced; mark it Practiced for opponent too.

archetypes.name: The Stepdad
archetypes.flavor: I don't have to be here. That's the point.
archetypes.mechanicalHook: Passive: counts as carrying any virtue tag held by a friendly Kin in his zone (for Resonance purposes).

archetypes.name: The Late Dad
archetypes.flavor: Take what he gave you. The rest, let go.
archetypes.mechanicalHook: Starts in your discard at match setup (not drawn). Once per match playable from discard at no cost; on entry, all your other cards gain +1 next effect AND you Practice Forgiving.

archetypes.name: The Conscious Dad
archetypes.tagline: Notices what he didn't notice yesterday.
archetypes.flavor: The story I'm telling myself is that I overreacted. Now let me check.
archetypes.mechanicalHook: onEnter: reveal opponent's hand; opponent draws 1. Passive: while in play, your Naming-tagged plays mark the named virtue Practiced for both players.

archetypes.name: The Tinkerer
archetypes.tagline: Fixes the wrong thing first. The right thing eventually.
archetypes.flavor: Replaces the wrong washer. Floods the basement. Laughs first. Then fixes it.
archetypes.mechanicalHook: Activated: tap, pay 1 Attention to return a card from your discard to hand. The dad-action of Mending.

archetypes.name: The Single Dad
archetypes.flavor: It's just us. We're going to be just fine. We always are. Three sandwiches at 10pm. A note in the napkin.
archetypes.mechanicalHook: onEnter: costs 1 less if no other Dad cards are in your zones. Passive: Tending-tagged cards refresh +1 Attention next turn.

archetypes.name: The Recovery Dad
archetypes.flavor: I am not the man I was last year. That is the work.
archetypes.mechanicalHook: Special: when discarded, once per match may return to a chosen zone at -1 effective stat. Passive: while in play, your Mending and Persisting cards capture RETURNED Moment.
